spec_match.rationale: Demonstrates the spec's headline surface — page mentions 4 of 4 extracted API names from the spec.

interactive.rationale: Real controls + script-driven side-effects make this hands-on, not a static card.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Page covers the promises the feature index makes for this concept.

edge_cases.rationale: Page handles unsupported Element.pseudo(), legacy getComputedStyle fallback, missing geometry APIs, event.pseudoTarget absence, and invalid pseudo selector probes.

references.rationale: The concept includes the required https://chromestatus.com/feature/5194399398756352 link plus spec and MDN references.

design_system.rationale: Raw badge and pseudo content colors were replaced with shared variables, and local button background overrides already pair color.

summary: The missing ChromeStatus reference and raw-color findings are resolved, and the script now guards Element before reading Element.prototype.
